Operation 'getOrderBidsByItem' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original description lacks detail about what constitutes a 'bid order', expected parameters (contract/token ID), pagination support, and return structure. Enhanced version clarifies the input requirements, output format, and filtering capabilities for better AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Retrieve bid orders for a specific NFT item.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve all bid orders for an NFT item
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all active bid orders placed on a specific NFT item identified by its contract address and token ID. Returns a paginated list of bid orders with bidder information, bid amounts, and order status. Supports filtering and sorting options to help identify the most relevant bids.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks detail about what constitutes a 'bid order', expected parameters (contract/token ID), pagination support, and return structure. Enhanced version clarifies the input requirements, output format, and filtering capabilities for better AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Create a new order or update an existing one.
